title: comfy-cli output envelope
description: Every --json command returns one of these on stdout. Streaming commands emit it as the last NDJSON line.

schema.description: Envelope contract version. Additive optional fields do not bump it; renamed/removed/retyped fields or changed exit semantics do.

type.description: Line discriminator: in NDJSON streams the final line is the envelope, every other line is an event.

ok.description: True iff the command succeeded. Mirrors a 0 exit code.

version.description: comfy-cli version that produced this output.

where.description: Backend that handled the command. Null for commands that don't route.

data.description: Command-specific payload. Schema lives in comfy_cli/schemas/<command>.json.

changed.description: Optional: present on mutating commands; true iff state changed.
